Mobile Wallet Passes

Live in your customer's wallet. Forever.

Apple Wallet and Google Wallet passes that update in real time. The marketing channel your competitors haven't figured out — and it's already on every customer's phone.

Pass Designer

Design your pass. Ship to both stores.

One designer outputs both Apple Wallet and Google Wallet passes — pixel-perfect for each platform's specs. No engineering. No designer ticket. No certificate hell.

Real-time Updates

The marketing channel that's already on every phone.

A loyalty pass in a wallet is a 24/7 brand presence. Balance changes, tier upgrades, expiring rewards -- they all push to the lock screen instantly, with open rates that make email look broken. Best of all: customers never delete their wallet passes.

  • ✓ Sub-2-second updates from your backend to the lock screen, both platforms
  • ✓ Lock-screen rich notifications with brand colors, custom icons, deep links
  • ✓ Webhook-driven -- fire updates from any system that can POST
  • ✓ Deliverability dashboard shows pass installs, updates pushed, taps received
See live update flow →
1
Customer redeems $50 at checkout
In-store POS, web checkout, or mobile app
12:04:11
2
99minds ledger updates instantly
Balance: $234.50 -> $184.50 · Webhook fires
12:04:11
3
Apple + Google push servers notified
Pass payload signed and sent to both
12:04:12
4
Customer's wallet shows new balance
"Balance updated · $184.50" -> lock screen
12:04:12
Geo-Fenced Notifications

Push when it matters. Where it matters.

Native iOS and Android both surface wallet passes on the lock screen when a user enters a geofence near a store location. Combined with our segmentation engine, you can send "your balance is $184 -- drop in" only to high-LTV customers within walking distance of a store.

  • ✓ Native geofencing via Apple Wallet & Google Wallet -- no app required
  • ✓ Bulk store-list upload -- define 1,000 locations in one CSV
  • ✓ Time-of-day & cohort filters -- only push to Gold members on weekday mornings
  • ✓ Dwell-time gating to avoid spam from customers walking past
Explore geo-targeting →
Northwind · SoHo
450m radius · 2 customers nearby
● Active
Northwind · Wallet
$184.50 store credit · You're 2 blocks away ✨
Multi-Pass, Multi-Program

One ledger. Every pass type.

Run loyalty, gift cards, store credit, event tickets, and limited-edition collectible passes -- all from one platform, all updating from one ledger. A customer can hold a stack of your passes and they'll all sync together when they redeem at checkout.

  • ✓ All major pass types -- loyalty, store cards, coupons, event tickets, generic
  • ✓ Cross-pass linking -- redeeming a coupon updates the loyalty pass automatically
  • ✓ Limited-edition drops -- collectible passes for marketing campaigns and brand moments
See all pass types →

passes

passes
For developers

No certificates. No P12 files. Just code.

We own the Apple Developer account, the Pass Type ID certificate, and the Google Wallet Issuer ID. You issue passes through one API. We handle the platform-specific signing, encoding, and delivery.

We own the certificate hell

No Apple Pass Type ID setup. No Google Wallet Issuer onboarding. Pass Type Identifiers, signing certificates, and issuer accounts are all managed by us.

Single API, dual platforms

One create-pass endpoint outputs both .pkpass for iOS and a Google Wallet save URL for Android. SMS link auto-detects platform.

Webhook on every interaction

pass.installed, pass.updated, pass.removed, geo.entered, and 12 more events. Trigger downstream marketing on each.

// Issue a wallet pass - Apple + Google in one call const pass = await client.walletPasses.create({" customer: 'cus_8KPq2x', type: 'loyalty', template: 'northwind_gold', fields: { member_name: 'Ada Lovelace', balance: 18450, // $184.50 points: 2840, tier: 'gold' }, delivery: { method: 'sms', // auto-detects iOS/Android phone: '+15551234567' }, geo_locations: 'northwind_stores' });   // -> 201 Created { "id": "wp_8x2K9q", "apple_url": "https://w.99m.co/p/8x...", "google_url": "https://pay.google.com/...", "universal_url": "https://w.99m.co/p/8x" }
Why teams switch from Badge & PassKit

Wallet that's part of your platform -- not another tool.

Badge and PassKit are dedicated wallet pass tools. We are too -- but we're also where your gift card balance, loyalty points, and store credit already live. So our passes update the moment those balances change.

Customer Story

How Sagehaus drove 4.2x repeat visits.

SAGEHAUS

"Wallet passes felt like marketing magic. Our customers see their balance every time they pull out their phone -- that's a brand impression we used to pay for. The geo-push when they're a block from one of our cafes has been an instant win for foot traffic."

EC
Eli Chen
Director of Retention, Sagehaus Coffee
Results in first 6 months
4.2x
Repeat visit rate among wallet pass holders
68%
Of newly issued cards installed to wallet within 24h
$0
Spent on Apple Developer account or Pass Type ID setup
9 days
From kickoff to first live pass on a customer's phone
Common questions

Things buyers usually ask.

No. We hold the Apple Pass Type ID certificate and Google Wallet Issuer account. Your passes are issued under the 99minds infrastructure but display your branding exclusively to the end user. This saves weeks of platform onboarding and avoids the recurring cost of maintaining your own Apple Developer membership and Pass Type ID renewals.
Yes. While the tightest integration is with 99minds gift cards and loyalty (where updates happen automatically and natively), our pass-update endpoint accepts updates from any system that can POST to a webhook. So you can keep using your current OMS or CRM and just push pass updates from there.
We get a pass.removed webhook the moment they delete it. You can use this to trigger re-engagement (email with a new install link), pause future updates, or update internal segmentation. The underlying customer balance/points are untouched — they live in the 99minds ledger, not the pass itself.
Both Apple Wallet and Google Wallet support native geofencing — the OS surfaces your pass on the lock screen when the user enters a geofence you defined. No app required, no location permissions beyond the wallet's own. We support up to 10 geofences per pass on iOS (Apple's limit) and unlimited on Android, with bulk store-list management for multi-location brands.
The pass itself shows balance/points display data only — the source of truth lives in our PCI-DSS Level 1 ledger. Pass data is signed by us so it can't be tampered with on the device. Sensitive identifiers (member ID, gift card token) are scoped to display-only and can't be reused for redemption without verification against our ledger.

Ready to live in your customer's wallet?

Start with a sandbox key in 30 seconds. Send your first pass to your own phone today.
